content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic motivation mechanisms (like ICM from autonomous agent research) can be repurposed to prioritize which new unlabeled data samples get stored in an active learning agent’s long-term memory, pruning redundant low-information data to push current SOTA memory efficiency even further in 2024-2025 models. This replaces arbitrary fixed capacity thresholds with intrinsic information gain to dynamically adapt memory footprint.
